expect: Bear thesis weakening as Iran de-escalation emerges. Gold and VIX should confirm if safe-haven trade is dead. EEM should continue outperforming on dollar weakness.
actual: Direction accuracy 10/18 (55.6%) at 3 days. BEAR equity calls (SPY, QQQ, AAPL) all wrong — market in risk-on. GLD worst performer (-4.9%). EEM best (+2.8%). Oil volatile (91-98) on Trump 48hr Iran/Hormuz ultimatum. VIX declining despite active conflict.
diff: Bear thesis anchored on Hormuz/stagflation narrative is failing 3 days in. Market ignoring geopolitical risk. Gold safe-haven thesis definitively not working. Key surprise: oil still 91-98 range — structural support persists even as de-escalation talk increases. EEM outperformance validates dollar-weakness thesis.
key_findings: Bear equity thesis (Hormuz+stagflation) wrong direction at 3 days — market risk-on
Gold safe-haven thesis failing: GLD -4.9%, worst performer across all 18 predictions
EEM best performer (+2.8%) — dollar weakness thesis is the one structural call working
Trump 48hr Iran/Hormuz ultimatum — binary event risk. Escalation = oil spikes to 110+, de-escalation = oil crashes to 75
Portfolio has 6 BEAR predictions all wrong — systematic overweight on crisis thesis
